overview_summary: All three profiled neighbors have no recorded stance on development, as none have been publicly identified supporting or opposing local projects. They also do not hold notable positions of community leadership, meaning none are high-influence neighbors in local affairs.

neighbors.name: William Joe Moffett
neighbors.claims: William Joe Moffett is listed as a landowner in Polk County, Georgia, associated with parcel 21680 [Polk County Tax Assessor's Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). No public statements or documented positions on local development or clean energy initiatives by Moffett were found in county records or news archives [Polk County Agendas and Minutes](https://www.polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/agendas_and_minutes.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage via a respectful personal introduction, focusing on understanding any concerns without assuming stance.

neighbors.name: Edward L. Cason & Paul Wesley Cason

Cason and Paul Wesley Cason jointly own a property in Polk County (parcel 23769), according to county tax records [Polk County Tax Assessor's Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). Neither individual has a recorded public stance on development or clean energy projects in local meeting minutes or media coverage [Polk County Agendas and Minutes](https://www.polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/agendas_and_minutes.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach the Cason family through a neutral community forum or mutual acquaintance, emphasizing listening to their views and any family concerns.

neighbors.name: Adam Clinton Payne
neighbors.claims: Adam Clinton Payne is identified as the owner of a Polk County parcel (ID 17995) in the county’s property records [Polk County Tax Assessor's Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). There is no evidence of Payne taking any public position for or against local development or energy initiatives in available public records or news sources [Polk County Agendas and Minutes](https://www.polkga.org/departments/tax_assessor/agendas_and_minutes.php).

approach_recommendations.engage: Initiate contact in an informal setting to build trust, being prepared to address any personal or property-related questions he may have.
